<h1 align="center">Exporting for other systems</h1>

<img align="center" alt="Screenshot" src=".github/assets/windows_screenshot.webp">
<img align="center" alt="Screenshot" src=".github/assets/ubuntu_screenshot.webp">

<p align="center">
  <p>This project can patch widgets so they run on any machine then export them as .ZIP (most compatible), .webarchive (Mac only), or a Python project (most features).
  <p>To do so, go to Options > Open Widget Exporter then drag your .wdgt bundle.</p>
</p>

## Known Issues

- The flip animation is goofy
- The resize is goofy
- The background of widgets isn't transparent
- Worse compatibility than main app
